name: QA 1148
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1148

mutual exclusion for pmlogger_check?

see also qa/1146 and qa/1147 for the versions testing the init

scripts and systemctl above the pmlogger_check level



Copyright (c) 2019 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.
